content: Boeing 737-800: climb rate ~1800 fpm (sea level, typical ops); cruise ~Mach 0.789 (~450-460kt TAS at altitude), max cruise Mach 0.79; V2 ~162kt (300km/h), initial climb speed ~176kt; stall speed ~113 KIAS clean-ish reference; VREF/final approach typically 130-145kt depending on weight (not directly returned by search, standard industry knowledge ~140kt at typical landing weight).
